calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Goal-stream selectivity and score-decomposition diagnostic
items.note: Non-contributory diagnostic following V3-EXQ-559a action_entropy=0.0. Measures schema salience selectivity, candidate/proposer diversity, E3 score component ranges, goal/bias argmin changes, and contact-seeded goal-memory arms.
